title: Senior Teacher - Lovely Professional University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Lovely Professional University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lovely Professional University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Lovely Professional University:
Lovely Professional University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University!
